label: New: AI Area Coach
items: Every garden area now has an AI Area Coach tab in its metrics view — open Location Management, pick a location and area, then tap the settings icon.
It reads your linked soil sensors (current readings plus 30-day history), the plants growing in that area and their needs, and your watering automations.
You get ideal target ranges for soil moisture, EC/nutrients and soil temperature — with a clear on-target / low / high status, what each metric means, and what to do about it.
It checks your watering automations and suggests sensible ones when you don't have any set up.
The coaching adapts to you — plain, reassuring guidance for newer gardeners and concise, technical detail for experts.
Analysis is cached and only refreshes when new sensor data arrives, so it stays fast and never repeats work.
